sections.paragraph:
κατοικτίρω 1 aor. subj. 1 pl. κατοικτίρωμεν 4 Macc 8:20, ptc. κατοικτίρας 4 Macc 12:2, inf. κατοικτίραι or κατοικτεῖραι (s. οἰκτίρω; Soph., Hdt.+; 4 Macc) have pity τὶ on someth. (Alciphron 3, 39, 3) τὴν ἡλικίαν (cp. 4 Macc 8:20 τὸ τ. μητρὸς γῆρας) MPol 3, 1.—DELG s.v. οἶκτος.

aor. aor. = aorist

subj. subj. = subjunctive; subject

  1. pl. = plural

ptc. ptc. = participle

inf. inf. = infinitive

Soph Soph , V b.c.—List 5

Hdt. Hdt. = Herodotus, V b.c.—List 5

someth. someth. = something

  1. cp. = compare, freq. in ref. to citation fr. ancient texts

MPol MPol = Martyrdom of Polycarp; after II a.d.—List 1

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 535
